# LBL Bau

LBL Bau is a regional construction and renovation company based in Heldenstein, Bavaria, Germany.

Website: https://www.lblbau.de
Phone: 0173 4593296
Email: kontakt@lbl-bau.de
Address: Kühamer Str. 2, 84431 Heldenstein, Germany

Core services:
- Renovierungsservice
- Trockenbau and Innenausbau
- Montage and Finish
- Unterstützende Arbeiten bei Fassadenprojekten with specialist partners
- Außenbereich-Unterstützung and Baustellenlogistik
- Neubau-Projektunterstützung as a local partner on selected works

Service area:
- Heldenstein
- Waldkraiburg
- Mühldorf am Inn
- Ampfing
- Kraiburg am Inn
- Landkreis Mühldorf
- Oberbayern

Positioning:
LBL Bau focuses on reliable local renovation and interior work, clean execution, careful planning, selected support on partner construction projects, and direct personal communication.

Important pages:
- Homepage: https://www.lblbau.de
- Impressum: https://www.lblbau.de/impressum
- Datenschutz: https://www.lblbau.de/datenschutz
